name: update_ticket
description: Update an existing ticket's properties such as status, priority, assignee, or tags. Use this to escalate, reassign, or close tickets as they move through your support workflow.

parameters.name: ticket_id
parameters.description: The ID of the ticket to update.

parameters.name: responder_id
parameters.description: ID of the agent to reassign the ticket to.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Replace existing tags with this list.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: ID of the group to assign the ticket to.
